translation: Read in the name of your Lord who creates –
notes: This is generally accepted to be the first Verse to be revealed to Prophet Muhammad (peace on him). It was revealed to him while he was meditating in a cave on the outskirts of Makkah. He was 40 years of age then. And it is significant to note that this very first Verse of divine revelation laid stress on reading or learning.
urdu: (اے محمدﷺ) اپنے پروردگار کا نام لے کر پڑھو جس نے (عالم کو) پیدا کیا

translation: Creates man from a clinging substance.
notes: Modern science has discovered that clinging substance to be the human fertilized egg – clinging to the wall of the uterus.
urdu: جس نے انسان کو خون کی پھٹکی سے بنایا

translation: Read and your Lord is most Liberal,
urdu: پڑھو اور تمہارا پروردگار بڑا کریم ہے

notes: A pen is what one writes with. In the modern scenario, it could be the digital software with which one can type or write.
urdu: جس نے قلم کے ذریعے سے علم سکھایا

translation: Taught mankind what it knew not.
notes: How true! It is through the writings on any subject that man learns that subject.
urdu: اور انسان کو وہ باتیں سکھائیں جس کا اس کو علم نہ تھا

translation: Man, on the other hand, is certainly indeed prone to transgression,
urdu: مگر انسان سرکش ہو جاتا ہے

translation: As he sees himself independent of any divine help!
urdu: جب کہ اپنے تیئں غنی دیکھتا ہے

translation: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
urdu: کچھ شک نہیں کہ (اس کو) تمہارے پروردگار ہی کی طرف لوٹ کر جانا ہے

translation: Have you seen him who forbids
urdu: بھلا تم نے اس شخص کو دیکھا جو منع کرتا ہے
(یعنی) ایک بندے کو جب وہ نماز پڑھنے لگتا ہے

translation: Do you see if he [the devotee] is on the right guidance,
urdu: بھلا دیکھو تو اگر یہ راہِ راست پر ہو
یا پرہیز گاری کا حکم کرے (تو منع کرنا کیسا)

translation: [And] do you see if he [who forbids the devotee from praying] denies [Guidance] and turns away [from it]?
urdu: اور دیکھو تو اگر اس نے دین حق کو جھٹلایا اور اس سے منہ موڑا (تو کیا ہوا)

translation: Does he not know that Allah does indeed see [his wickedness]?
urdu: کیااس کو معلوم نہیں کہ خدا دیکھ رہا ہے

arabic: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمۡ يَنتَهِ لَنَسۡفَعَۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
transliteration: Kalla lain lam yantahi lanasfaAAan bialnnasiyati
translation: Nay! If he does not desist, We will drag him by the forelock –
urdu: دیکھو اگر وہ باز نہ آئے گا تو ہم (اس کی) پیشانی کے بال پکڑ گھسیٹیں گے
یعنی اس جھوٹے خطاکار کی پیشانی کے بال

translation: Then let him call those who would help him,
urdu: تو وہ اپنے یاروں کی مجلس کو بلالے

translation: We will call the guardians of Hell.
urdu: ہم بھی اپنے موکلانِ دوزخ کو بلا لیں گے

translation: Nay! Obey him not, but prostrate and get near (to Allah).
notes: The incidence narrated here apparently refers to a real one that took place during the early (Makkan) period of Muhammad’s prophethood. The devotee referred to here could be the Prophet himself. He used to pray at the Kaabah, and one of his bitter opponents forbade him from doing so.
urdu: دیکھو اس کا کہا نہ ماننا اور قربِ (خدا) حاصل کرتے رہنا
